title: Ruby Heart Progression
description: Start with three hearts and experience a new heart progression inspired by Terraria! Adds items that add onto your max hearts and also absorb damage
body:
# ❤️ Ruby Heart Progression

**Start your game with three hearts and experience a new pacing and progression system inspired by Terraria! Adds new items that expand your max hearts, grant special effects, and change how damage and health progression work.**

---

## 🧩 Overview

**Ruby Heart Progression** reimagines Minecraft’s health system by introducing a true sense of growth.  
You’ll begin fragile, with only three hearts, but through crafting and discovery, you will expand your vitality and unlock new forms of survival.

---

## 💎 Core Items

### ❤️ Ruby Heart
Adds **permanent hearts** on top of your existing health until you reach a full row.  
These hearts **persist after death**, making them your foundation for long-term progression.

**Crafting Recipe:**
- 🍎 Apple  
- 🔴 Redstone  
- 🕷️ Spider Eye  
- 🌺 Poppy  

> Consume it to permanently gain one heart (up to your first full row).

---

### 🌸 Heartbloom Fruit
An **edible heart extender** that also restores hunger and offers temporary regeneration and durability effects.  
Its main role is to fill your **second row of hearts** once Ruby Hearts have maxed out.

**Crafting Recipe:**
- 🍏 Enchanted Golden Apple  
- ✨ Glow Berries  
- 🐡 Pufferfish  
- 🔥 Magma Cream  

> A rare and valuable consumable for advanced progression.

---

### 💀 Soul Heart 
A special kind of **absorption heart** that takes damage instead of your main health and disappears when depleted.  
They serve as temporary protection; ideal for combat situations or as a safety buffer.

You can craft Soul Hearts in **two ways**:

**Option 1:**
- ❤️ Ruby Heart  
- 😢 Ghast Tear → *Yields 4 Soul Hearts*

**Option 2:**
- 🦑 Glow Ink Sac  
- 💎 2× Amethyst Shards  
- 👻 Phantom Membrane  

**Details:**
- Can stack up to **half a row**  
- Cooldown of **1.5 seconds** between activations  
- Not meant for spam use, more so to prep before PvP & PvE battles  
- Alternative to golden apples with unique risk-reward playstyle  

> A temporary, strategical buffer to protect your hearts
---
